<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get benefit fields requirements by ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/benefits/{benefit_id}/requirements"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns field requirements for the requested benefit type.

scope: `benefits:read`
